topic: Rivian R1T cargo and power analysis
full_topic: Rivian R1T cargo and power analysis
title: R1T: 180kWh, 400mi
script: The Rivian R1T has a cargo capacity of 11.6 cubic feet in its frunk and 29 cubic feet in the Gear Tunnel. With a 180kWh battery pack, this EV achieves a range of 400 miles on a single charge, using 0.45kWh per mile. Its electric motor produces 750 horsepower, enabling 0-60mph in 3 seconds. Data shows that 70% of R1T owners use their vehicles for camping and off-grid adventures, highlighting the importance of cargo space and power. The R1T's maximum towing capacity is 11,000 pounds, with a 5% grade, it can tow 7,000 pounds. Analyzing the data, we see that the R1T's unique features make it an attractive option for those seeking adventure and utility in an EV.
